title: Quick Start Guide - Emu - First Screen, Charge Case/ Pairing 1 - zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Start Guide zoom in/out toggle on Charge Case screen does not match Figma Pairing (Option 1) text or fails to zoom out on second tap
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → Device Settings → [Connected Device Name].
4. On the first screen (Charge Case/Pairing 1), locate and tap the blue circle button on the 'Charge Case' section.
5. Observe the earbud view on screen.
6. Tap the same blue circle button again.
expected: 1. After first tap: The earbud zooms in and the screen text matches the Figma Pairing (Option 1) screen design. 2. After second tap: The screen zooms out to the original view.
